title: Forgematica-Litematica Stick
description: This mod simply adds a stick for the Forgematica and Litematica mods (with plans to port them), the code is open (if I can put it here)
body:
The mod exists only for convenience, with default settings

and then I don't know what to write, but okay, this mod was created very quickly, just for convenience, the mod contains a stick, yes, a stick that can be crafted from a stick
